falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by at least 2.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the pattern's implied bearish exhaustion, invalidating the 'hold' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day trading volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would suggest a blowoff top scenario rather than a bottoming pattern, directly contradicting the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The U.S. Non-Farm Payrolls report shows employment growth of 300K+ jobs (vs. forecast 180K) with unemployment <3.5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This macroeconomic event would trigger a clear bullish breakout, falsifying the pattern's implied bearish trajectory.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
